description: Time series AutoGluon pipeline: load and split panel data, train and refit models, build leaderboard.

components.description: Load time series data from S3, cleanse, and write per-series train/test splits.

stages.description: Validate inputs, read panel data from S3, parse timestamps, and deduplicate series keys.
Apply per-series temporal splits and write train/validation/test CSVs.

components.description: Train AutoGluon time series models, refit top N, evaluate on holdout, and render leaderboard.

stages.description: Load train/test CSVs and build TimeSeriesDataFrames.
Run TimeSeriesPredictor fit on selection train and rank on test.
Refit top models, evaluate on holdout, and write metrics, back_testing.json, and notebooks.
Aggregate model metrics, rank models, and render leaderboard HTML.
